validation_rule: Files must be readable as UTF-8 and have a single header row.
recommended_action: Re-export as UTF-8 CSV and verify delimiters.

validation_rule: Employee ID must be nonblank and unique within employee-level tables.
Dates should use ISO format YYYY-MM-DD.
recommended_action: Convert date text in Power Query before load.

validation_rule: Currency values must be numeric and non-negative.
recommended_action: Remove separators/symbols and set decimal or fixed-decimal type.

validation_rule: Rates must use one consistent scale before visualization.
recommended_action: Confirm whether values are 0-1 or 0-100 and format consistently.

validation_rule: One-side dimension keys must contain no duplicates.
recommended_action: Deduplicate dimension tables before creating relationships.

validation_rule: Headers must be unique and contain only letters, numbers, or underscores.
Combine only files that share the same schema.
recommended_action: Filter Folder Path and Extension before Combine Files.
